mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guest(g_name, g_phone, g_birth) VALUES(#{g_name}, #{g_phone}, #{g_birth})
mapper.update: UPDATE guest g INNER JOIN reservation re ON g.g_code = re.g_code SET g_check = 1 WHERE re.reservation_no = #{reservation_no} AND g.g_phone = #{g_phone} AND re.check_out_date < CURDATE()
mapper.select: SELECT g.* FROM guest g INNER JOIN reservation re ON g.g_code = re.g_code WHERE re.reservation_no = #{reservation_no} AND g.g_phone = #{g_phone}
SELECT g.* FROM guest g INNER JOIN reservation re ON g.g_code = re.g_code WHERE re.reservation_no = #{reservation_no} AND g.g_check = 0;
